match.userMessage:

{
  "sceneId": "scene_001",
  "sceneNumber": 1,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "Scarlett's fingers lift the lid of the white box on the sunlit vanity and draw out the coral lipstick tube.  \nShe rotates the base with her thumb, extending the glossy coral bullet in a slow twist.  \nHer index finger traces the smooth surface of the bullet before bringing it toward her mouth.  \nThe lipstick glides across her lower lip in one continuous stroke, leaving a vivid coral layer.  \nShe presses her lips together, then parts them into a soft smile that catches the window light.",
    "dialogue": []
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Applying Coral Lipstick",
    "durationSeconds": 12,
    "location": "INT. VANITY ROOM - DAY",

  },

    "styleTag": "cinematic realistic"
  },
  "prompts": {
    "visual": {
      "fullPrompt": "Cinematic realistic still of SCARLETT at a sunlit vanity, fingers beginning to lift the lid of the white box with potential energy in the motion, modern interior vanity table bathed in bright natural window light casting clean directional shadows across soft neutral surfaces, high-key airy atmosphere with warm sunlight highlights and lifted shadows, eye-level angle with shallow depth of field emphasizing tactile details on the box, modern social-first product photography style with crisp whites and true-to-life color grading.",

        "lighting": "Bright natural window light creating clean directional shadows and warm highlights in a high-key airy setup",

        "composition": "Tactile focus on hands and box as central element with soft background bokeh",

    }

}

{
  "sceneId": "scene_002",
  "sceneNumber": 2,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "Scarlett walks forward along the promenade, her blonde hair lifting and settling with each step in the breeze.  \nShe raises one hand to tuck a strand behind her ear while the ocean horizon stays steady behind her.  \nAt the shoreline she lowers the lipstick into the wet sand next to her bare foot, then straightens.  \nA shallow wave rolls in and curls around her ankles, nudging the lipstick slightly before receding.  \nScarlett steps sideways through the foam, coral lips parted in a quick laugh as another wave gathers.",
    "dialogue": []
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Beach Promenade Walk",
    "durationSeconds": 15,
    "location": "EXT. BEACH PROMENADE - DAY",

<DIRECTOR_STYLE>
(Strictly apply camera movement and pacing preferences)
{
  "mood": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool",
  "artStyle": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save",
  "lighting": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Warm late-afternoon glow for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast",
  "colorPalette": [
    "#FFFFFF",
    "#F0E6D3",
    "#D4536D",
    "#1A1A1A",
    "#E8F4E8"
  ],
  "cameraWork": "Dynamic mix of handheld and locked shots with consistent energy. Handheld with natural micro-movement for lifestyle moments -- hands interacting, daily rituals, real context. Quick-cut to locked beauty frames for hero product shots. Macro details on textures and surfaces. Overhead flat-lays directly above. Eye-level and slightly above angles. Shallow depth of field on tactile details. Energetic pacing -- no lingering, every frame earns its time",
  "referenceFilms": [
    "modern social-first skincare-brand content",
    "dewy minimalist beauty-brand visual identity",
    "sun-soaked lifestyle beauty campaigns",
    "playful color-blocked skincare content"
  ],
  "colorGrading": "Clean and bright with true-to-life color. Whites are crisp, skin tones warm and natural. Minimal processing -- the product looks like it does in your hand. Slight warmth in highlights, lifted shadows keeping everything airy. One accent color pops against neutral base"
}
</DIRECTOR_STYLE>
